item.title: simply lovely todo.txt
item.description: todo.txt is a super-simple way for personal todos. Does only one job and does it well. It being only a bash(.sh) file makes installing it easy and hackable (not in a malicious way). There are lots of “community apps” based on todo.txt both graphical and terminal-based. And there is also an Android app. But in this post I’m going to explore raw-dog todo.txt CLI. let’s install Download latest package(.zip or .

item.title: THKÜ RSS
item.description: Checking updates on announcement pages can get really annoying, especially if there are multiple of them and you have to check them periodically in order not to miss time-critical ones. To get updates from the university I(how selfish) study at (THKÜ), I started writing THKÜ RSS generator. Basically it fetches HTML, parses it, creates XML feeds for each annoucement site (as I mentioned there are multiple announcement sites). how to get it?
